creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Distinfo patch was included in PR/125550 and lippe@ took it.

On Sat, Jul 19, 2008 at 07:40:12PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of science/netcdf,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/125780 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125780
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

                              Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@sunpoet.net>
